headline: Building secure, intelligent systems that actually solve problems.
bio: Cybersecurity & Software Engineer. Competitive athlete. Introspective writer.
contact_text: Open to interesting problems, ambitious projects, or collaborations that matter.
about: I'm a Cybersecurity & Software Engineer who builds secure, performant systems that actually solve problems.
Beyond the code, I'm a competitive badminton athlete training for the Mauritian Open 2026, a disciplined runner, and a writer who explores emotion and paradox through introspective poetry.
I believe deeply in discipline, intentionality, and the pursuit of long-term mastery.

projects.title: AgriMesh Autonomous
projects.desc: Agent-driven Farm OS for Zimbabwe. An autonomous farm intelligence system that designs and simulates smart agricultural layouts based on geospatial land selection.

projects.title: Tank Failure Pressure Prediction
projects.desc: ML project that predicts target pressure (bar) for tank failure from engineering and process features. Uses advanced models for safety applications.

projects.title: Blog Management System
projects.desc: Modern full-stack blog application with portfolio-style responsive grid UI. Supports thumbnails, categories, excerpts, and complete CRUD operations.

projects.title: Avail Sport Application
projects.desc: A FlutterFlow app connecting users with sports, gym, and educational activities in Mauritius. Features activity discovery, booking system, and user profiles.

projects.title: Online Classroom Platform
projects.desc: Internal learning platform for Accenture employees, featuring live sessions, resource sharing, and progress tracking with enterprise-grade architecture.

experience.points:
• Designed and enforced security architectures using Check Point firewalls.
  • Managed endpoints with Microsoft Intune and built internal/external policy frameworks.
  • Worked with Rapid7 for vulnerability scanning and SIEM tools for threat detection and incident response.

• Architected and launched a full-stack online classroom platform.
  • Built enterprise-grade engineering: Java/Spring Boot backend, React.js frontend, MongoDB for data modeling.
  • Designed REST APIs and implemented performance optimizations at scale.

• Built MySQL schemas for data-heavy applications and Python automation scripts.
  • Created Docker containers for deployment and RESTful APIs in C and Python.
  • Learned to scope work, ship on deadline, and communicate with non-technical clients.
